title: Stock Market Sectors 101: A Guide to All 11 Sectors
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The 11 stock market sectors are: materials, financials, consumer discretionary, communication services, health care, information technology, industrials, energy
excerpt: The 11 stock market sectors are: materials, financials, consumer discretionary, communication services, health care, information technology, industrials, energy, utilities, consumer staples, and real estate. These sectors categorize companies based on their primary business activities.

content.introduction: The 11 stock market sectors are: materials, financials, consumer discretionary, communication services, health care, information technology, industrials, energy, utilities, consumer staples, and real estate. These sectors categorize companies based on their primary business activities.
